bugs.name: Pagination off-by-one
bugs.description: Change slice to use `page * pageSize` instead of `(page - 1) * pageSize`, so page 1 starts at row 11 instead of row 1.
bugs.hint: First page of users table is missing the first 10 users

bugs.name: Sort direction inverted
bugs.description: Swap 'asc' and 'desc' in the sort comparison, so clicking a column header sorts descending first instead of ascending.
bugs.hint: Clicking a column header sorts in the wrong direction

bugs.name: Search filter is case-sensitive
bugs.description: Remove `.toLowerCase()` from the search filter comparison so searches become case-sensitive.
bugs.hint: Searching 'john' finds nothing, but 'John' works

bugs.name: Login accepts short passwords
bugs.description: Change password length check from `< 6` to `< 2`, effectively allowing 2-character passwords.
bugs.hint: Can log in with a 2-character password despite the 6-char minimum rule

bugs.name: Signup confirm password not validated
bugs.description: Remove the `isSignup && password !== confirmPassword` check so mismatched passwords are accepted.
bugs.hint: Signup succeeds even when confirm password doesn't match

bugs.name: Password toggle shows wrong label
bugs.description: Swap the aria-label values so 'Show password' shows when password IS visible and vice versa.
bugs.hint: Screen reader announces 'Show password' when password is already visible

bugs.name: Wizard skips company validation
bugs.description: Change the step check for company validation from `step === 1` to `step === 99`, so it never runs.
bugs.hint: Can proceed past Company step without entering a company name

bugs.name: Wizard step indicator off by one
bugs.description: Change `i < step` to `i < step - 1` in the step indicator, so completed steps don't get the checkmark styling until two steps later.
bugs.hint: Step indicator doesn't show checkmark for the most recently completed step

bugs.name: Wizard review shows wrong name
bugs.description: Swap firstName and lastName in the review display so 'John Smith' shows as 'Smith John'.
bugs.hint: Review step shows last name before first name

bugs.name: Modal doesn't close on Escape
bugs.description: Change the Escape key check from `e.key === 'Escape'` to `e.key === 'Esc'` (non-standard), so Escape key no longer closes the modal.
bugs.hint: Pressing Escape does nothing when a modal is open

bugs.name: Modal backdrop click broken
bugs.description: Change the backdrop click check so it never matches (compare against a non-existent ref), making backdrop clicks not close the modal.
bugs.hint: Clicking outside the modal dialog doesn't close it

bugs.name: Toast uses wrong color for errors
bugs.description: Change the error toast color from 'bg-red-500' to 'bg-green-500' so error toasts look like success toasts.
bugs.hint: Error notifications appear in green instead of red

bugs.name: Select-all only selects first row
bugs.description: Change toggleSelectAll to only add the first user from the page instead of all users.
bugs.hint: Select-all checkbox only selects 1 user instead of all 10 on the page

bugs.name: Bulk actions don't clear selection
bugs.description: Remove the `setSelectedIds(new Set())` call in bulkAction, so selections persist after performing a bulk action.
bugs.hint: After performing a bulk action, users remain selected

bugs.name: Mark-all-read doesn't work
bugs.description: Change markAllRead to set `read: false` instead of `read: true`, so it marks everything as unread.
bugs.hint: Clicking 'Mark all as read' has no visible effect (items stay unread)

bugs.name: Kanban add task saves to wrong column
bugs.description: Hardcode the new task status to 'todo' regardless of which column's + button was clicked.
bugs.hint: Adding a task from 'In Progress' column puts it in 'To Do' instead

bugs.name: Task detail modal shows stale status
bugs.description: Remove the `setSelectedTask(prev => ...)` line from the move-to select handler, so the modal keeps showing the old status after changing it.
bugs.hint: After moving a task via the dropdown, the modal still shows the old status

bugs.name: SlideOver missing aria-modal
bugs.description: Remove `aria-modal="true"` from the slide-over panel.
bugs.hint: Screen readers don't recognize the slide-over as a modal dialog

bugs.name: Search autocomplete keyboard nav broken
bugs.description: Swap ArrowDown and ArrowUp handlers so pressing Down moves the selection up and vice versa.
bugs.hint: Arrow keys navigate search results in the wrong direction

bugs.name: Notification badge hardcoded
bugs.description: Change the notification badge from '3' to '0' so it always shows zero even though there are unread notifications.
bugs.hint: Notification bell always shows 0 despite unread notifications existing
